qas.q: Which agency created the list of standard precautions?
qas.a: CDC (centers for disease control and prevention)

qas.q: All body fluids must be considered ________________, and all patients are possible ______________________ infection.
For which patients should standard precautions be used?
qas.a: for all patients regardless of their illness

qas.q: What is the best way to avoid spreading pathogens?
When should healthcare workers wash their hands?
qas.a:
1) before and after procedures
2) after removing gloves
3) between patient care
4) after contact with infectious materials

qas.q: Why is it important for healthcare workers to wear personal protective equipment?
qas.a: shield you from pathogens (risk of coming into contact with infectious materials)

qas.q: Name examples of sharps
How is a sharp disposed of?
What should a healthcare worker do with a soaked piece of gauze?
What should a healthcare worker do with blood soaked bed sheets?
what should be done after a spill is wiped up with a cloth?
qas.a: disinfect the area with a bleach cleaner (check material data sheet first)

qas.q: When should gowns be worn?
qas.a: when it is likely to be in contact with blood or infectious material

qas.q: After use, where should a healthcare worker put a disposable gown?
After use, where should a healthcare worker put a non-disposable gown?
qas.a: biohazardous linen bags where they are sent off to be cleaned and disinfected

qas.q: The same gown should _______ be worn for more than one patient
The outside of a used gown is considered _________________
When should masks and eyewear be worn?
qas.a: anytime splashes of blood or any bodily fluid may come into contact with you

qas.q: List the order in which the four kinds of personal protective equipment should be donned.
Are masks reusable?
Is eyewear reusable?
The stings of the elastic bands of masks and eyewear are considered ________________
When should gloves be worn?
How long can a single pair of gloves be used?
qas.a: change every patient, or if it get punctured in between

qas.q: When should hands be washed when you will be wearing gloves?
qas.a: before you put the gloves on and after you dispose of it
